description:
Nagel Stapling machine staples
PHE carry a large range of Nagel staples to suit Nagel stapling machines

In order to guarantee the proper functioning of your Nagel stapling machine we recommend to use original Nagel staples

Staples available include
simple traditional stales
Loop staples allow filing documents without punching
S = high tensile steel wire
B extra thick wire
RI = Loop staples
